source_pr.title: load data: physical mode part1
source_pr.body:

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #40499

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
- ingegrate lightning physical mode into load data

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Test asserted `SELECT *` results without ORDER BY (physical import mode can return rows in nondeterministic order).
failure_signature: SELECT * without ORDER BY used for row-by-row assertions in realtikv LOAD DATA tests
root_cause_explanation: The realtikv LOAD DATA tests were flaky because they queried and asserted rows using `SELECT *` without an `ORDER BY`, assuming a stable row order after physical import. Physical import can produce rows in nondeterministic order, making such assertions flaky. This PR stabilizes the tests by introducing an explicit `querySql` per case (e.g., `select * from t order by a` / `order by b`) so result ordering is deterministic before comparing rows.
fix_pattern: When asserting full-table results, always add an explicit `ORDER BY` (or sort results) before row-by-row comparisons; do not rely on implicit row order.

evidence: evidence: race = "on", | querySql: "select * from t order by a", (tests/realtikvtest/loaddatatest/load_data_test.go)

files: br/pkg/lightning/mydump/loader.go, executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/chunk_process.go, executor/importer/data_import.go, executor/importer/engine_process.go, executor/importer/engine_process_test.go, executor/importer/import.go, executor/importer/kv_encode.go, executor/importer/session.go, executor/importer/table_import.go, tests/realtikvtest/loaddatatest/BUILD.bazel, tests/realtikvtest/loaddatatest/load_data_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/loaddatatest/main_test.go
